name: Wide Panorama
description: Pure vista. Environment overwhelms the frame, figures optional and tiny.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A panoramic vista — the environment, vast and uncontained.
{setting}. A sweeping wide shot, the landscape filling the frame edge to edge.
{setting}. An establishing panorama, scale beyond any figure within it.

1: {subject}, very small, lower third, dwarfed by the environment.

background_pool: An epic mountain range stretching horizon to horizon, snow-capped peaks in layered ridges of white and deep blue, glaciers carving valleys between them, a foreground of alpine meadow dotted with wildflowers, the sky a vast gradient from deep blue to pale gold near the horizon

An ocean of dunes rolling to infinity, wind-carved ridges in sharp curves of gold and shadow, the sand rippled in foreground detail, a sky of pale burning blue, the scale almost incomprehensible with no reference point except the tiny figures

A great savanna plain under a towering thunderhead, flat-topped acacia trees scattered across amber grass, a distant mountain silhouette on the horizon, the storm cloud building in dark blue and grey with shafts of rain visible below, golden light on the foreground grass

A polar ice shelf extending to the horizon, pressure ridges of blue-white ice jutting at angles, a lead of dark water cutting through, the sky a wash of pale pink and lavender at the low sun, ice crystals sparkling in the air
action_pool: standing perfectly still, facing the vista
walking forward at a slow pace
standing with weight on one leg, the other resting
